Terms of Service

Last updated: March 2026

Welcome to PairdUps. By creating an account or using our service, you agree to these Terms of Service.

1. Eligibility. You must be at least 18 years old to use PairdUps. By registering, you confirm you meet this requirement.

2. Account Responsibility. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for all activities under your account.

3. User Conduct. You agree not to use PairdUps to harass, threaten, or harm others. Inappropriate content, spam, or fraudulent activity will result in account suspension.

4. Content. You retain ownership of content you post but grant PairdUps a license to display it within the platform. You must not post content that is illegal, offensive, or infringes on others' rights.

5. Safety. PairdUps is a platform for connecting people. We do not conduct background checks. Always meet in public places and exercise personal safety judgment.

6. Limitation of Liability. PairdUps is provided "as is." We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the service or interactions with other users.

7. Termination. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

PairdUps respects your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

1. Information We Collect. We collect your name, email, age, location, profile photo, and activity preferences that you provide when creating an account and listings.

2. How We Use It. Your information is used to display your profile and listings to other users, facilitate connections, and improve the service.

3. Data Storage. Your data is stored locally on your device. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

4. Your Rights. You can edit or delete your profile and listings at any time. You can block other users and delete conversations.

5. Communication. Your email address is never displayed to other users. It is used only for account management and optional notifications.

6. Security. We take reasonable measures to protect your data, but no system is completely secure.

7. Changes. We may update this policy from time to time. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of any changes.

🍪 Cookie Policy

Last updated: March 2026

This Cookie Policy explains how PairdUps uses cookies and similar technologies when you use our app and services.

1. What Are Cookies? Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you use our service. They help us remember your preferences, keep you signed in, and improve your experience.

2. Types of Cookies We Use.

Essential Cookies: Required for the app to function. These keep you logged in, remember your session, and store your preferences (like dark mode and notification settings). You cannot opt out of these.

Functional Cookies: Help us remember your choices such as language preference, preferred units (miles/km), distance radius, and display settings. These enhance your experience but are not strictly necessary.

Analytics Cookies: Help us understand how users interact with PairdUps so we can improve the service. This data is aggregated and anonymous. We do not use third-party analytics trackers.

3. Local Storage. PairdUps primarily uses your browser's local storage (similar to cookies) to store your profile data, settings, listings, and conversations on your device. This data stays on your device and is not transmitted to third parties.

4. Third-Party Cookies. PairdUps does not use third-party advertising cookies. We do not sell your data to advertisers. Map features may use third-party tile providers (OpenStreetMap) which have their own cookie policies.

5. Managing Cookies. You can clear cookies and local storage through your browser settings at any time. Note that clearing this data will sign you out and reset your preferences. You can also use the "Cancel Account" feature in Settings to permanently remove all your data.

6. Updates. We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date. Continued use of PairdUps after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

7. Contact Us. If you have questions about our use of cookies, please reach out through the Help & Support section of the app.

👋
Sign Out?
Are you sure you want to Sign Out? We hope you found some exciting PairdUps to join and also created some of your own fun PairdUps!

You can always sign back in anytime. 💜
🔖
This Is Your PairdUp!
You don't need to save your own PairdUp — it's already in your My Listings tab!

The Save for Later feature is for bookmarking other people's PairdUps that you're interested in. 🔖
⚠️
This Is Your PairdUp!
You cannot send a request to join a PairdUp that you created. We're sure that others will respond to your unique PairdUp posting!

In the meantime, discover other exciting PairdUps and start sending requests. 🎉
🤔
Already Sent!
You have already sent a request to join this PairdUp. You can find your request by selecting the Messages icon at the bottom of the screen (and send a new message there if you like).

If you haven't received a response, try sending a request to a different PairdUp, or even create your own unique PairdUp for others to join!

We know you'll find many exciting PairdUps soon! 🎉
⏰
This PairdUp Has Expired
This PairdUp has expired, but you can still send a request and a message to the PairdUp creator. Remind them that it's expired — maybe they'll decide to go on the PairdUp with you anyway, just on another calendar date?

Give it a try, you never know! 😊
🎉
Help & Support
Everything you need to know about PairdUps!
🤝 What is PairdUps?
PairdUps is where amazing people meet for amazing experiences! Whether you're looking for a hiking buddy, a coffee companion, a tennis partner, or even a dinner date — PairdUps connects you with real people who share your passions.

It's simple: Create a PairdUp or Join someone else's. No swiping, no games — just genuine connections through shared activities! 🌟
🔍 Discovering PairdUps
Browse the Discover tab to find exciting PairdUps near you! Use the category pills at the top to filter by activity type — Sports, Coffee, Dining, Culture, and more.

Tap the 🔍 Filter button to narrow by country, state/province, and city. Found something you love? Hit Send Request and introduce yourself!
✨ Creating Your Own PairdUp
Tap the pink + button or go to your Profile → Create a NEW PairdUp. Fill in the details — title, activity, date, time, venue, and a fun description!

Your profile photo becomes your PairdUp's cover image, so make sure it's a great one! 📸 Others will see your PairdUp on the Discover feed and can send you join requests.
💬 Messages & Connections
When you send a join request, it creates a conversation in your Messages tab. The PairdUp creator gets notified and can reply!

Tap anyone's profile photo in a chat to see their full profile, bio, and interests. You can also block or report users from the chat menu if needed.
💡 Pro Tips
Upload a real photo — profiles with photos get way more responses! 📷

Write a great bio — let people know what makes you awesome!

Be specific with venues — include the full name and area so the map can find it.

Send a personal message with your join request — it makes a huge difference! 💌
🛡️ Staying Safe
Always meet in public places for your first PairdUp.

Tell a friend where you're going and who you're meeting.

Trust your instincts — if something feels off, it's okay to cancel.

Use the Report and Block features if anyone is inappropriate.
📩
Contact Support
Have a suggestion, question, or issue? We'd love to hear from you!

Cancel Your Account?
This will cancel your account and erase your profile data along with all messages and PairdUps associated with the email you used in signing up.

You can sign up in the future with the same email (or a different one) but you will have to start fresh and re-create your profile.

Are you sure you want to cancel your account?
